name: Delta SkyMiles® Gold Business American Express Card
title: Delta SkyMiles® Gold Business American Express Card (American Express)
text:
Card: Delta SkyMiles® Gold Business American Express Card (American Express)
BEST FOR BUSINESS OWNERS WHO WANT A DELTA CARD WITH A MID-LEVEL ANNUAL FEE 
Pros: Zone 5 priority boarding,First checked bag free,20% discount on in-flight on select purchases (in the form of statement credits)
Cons: No Delta SkyClub lounge access,Has an annual fee
Why we chose it: The low annual fee is reasonable, as cardholders can expect a free checked bag on Delta flights, which more than offsets the cost after just four flights each year. Throw in a 20% discount on inflight food, beverage and headset purchases, plus up to $150 Delta Stays statement credit and priority boarding, and this card covers all the bases. (Partner offer)
Who it's good for: This card is best for business owners who fly Delta occasionally but not enough to achieve Medallion elite status. You’ll still enjoy comparable perks such as a first free checked bag on every flight, priority boarding, and a 20% discount on in-flight purchases (as a statement credit) — all without having to fly tens of thousands of miles each year chasing elite status.
Annual fee: $0 introductory annual fee for the first year, then $150
Recommended credit: 670-850
Rewards: 1 - 2X miles
Intro bonus: Limited Time Offer: Earn 90,000 Bonus Miles after spending $6,000 in purchases on your new Card in your first 6 months of Card Membership. Offer ends 4/1/26.
Points valuation: 1.25
Limited time: Limited-Time Offer
APR: 29.99% Variable,28.74% Variable,19.49% - 28.49% Variable
Transfer partners: This card earns Amex points
Review: https://thepointsguy.com/guide/gold-delta-skymiles-business-amex-credit-card-review/
